generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how critical strategic autonomy is for our security. When I was stationed overseas, we relied on allies who suddenly changed priorities—leaving us vulnerable. That's why I support policies that ensure we can defend ourselves without depending on others. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
